dashboard.subtitle: Welcome to your web application template

pages.comingSoonHint: This section is part of the skeleton. Add your content here.

radar.title: Radar
radar.subtitle: Claude queries the web live: the niches that are working right now (with their demonetization risk) and the tools of the moment worth knowing.
radar.error: The scan didn't complete. Try again — the analysis queries the web live and can take a moment.
radar.empty: The radar is off. Run a scan to see the niches of the moment.
radar.emptyHint: Reminder: a “hot” niche without a human angle is still demonetizable. The radar rates that risk.

tools.title: Tools of the moment
tools.subtitle: Editing, voice, visuals, captions, publishing — what's recommended right now, with the pitfalls (pricing, watermark, rights) to know.
tools.error: The watch didn't complete. Try again — it queries the web live.
tools.empty: Run the watch to see the tools recommended right now, and especially what changed recently.

parametres.title: Settings
parametres.subtitle: Tune what the radar and the studio take into account.
parametres.categoriesHint: The niche scan is limited to the checked categories. If you uncheck them all, the radar explores all of them.
